evals.prompt: I have an OpenAPI 3.0 document and need TypeScript types to validate its structure. Show me how to define the root OpenAPI object with info, paths, and components using @ahoo-wang/fetcher-openapi types.
evals.expected_output: TypeScript code importing OpenAPI, Info, Paths, Components types and using them to define a valid OpenAPI 3.0 document structure

evals.prompt: Help me create a TypeScript definition for a polymorphic schema using discriminator with oneOf in OpenAPI. I need to model Admin and User types that inherit from a base type.
evals.expected_output: TypeScript code using Schema and Discriminator types from @ahoo-wang/fetcher-openapi with oneOf and discriminator mapping

evals.prompt: I need to define API operation parameters including path params, query params, and request bodies. Show me how to type a POST /users endpoint with required body and response types.
evals.expected_output: TypeScript code using Operation, RequestBody, Parameter, and Response types from @ahoo-wang/fetcher-openapi
